name: realtime-alignment-video
description: Remotion composition for the Realtime Alignment Workspace hackathon demo video.

scripts.build: bun x remotion render src/index.ts RealtimeAlignment out/realtime-alignment.mp4
scripts.build-long: bun x remotion render src/index.ts RealtimeAlignmentLong out/realtime-alignment-long.mp4
scripts.still: bun x remotion still src/index.ts RealtimeAlignment out/thumbnail.png --frame=360
